content: Lo sapevate che in Giappone, se avete un tatuaggio, non vi sarà permesso di fare il bagno in molte delle località termali?
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:Did you know in Japan, if you have a tattoo, you won't be allowed to bathe in many of the hot spring resorts﹖
eng:Did you know that in Japan, if you have a tattoo, you won't be allowed to bathe in many of the hot spring resorts﹖
